title: Invariant Registry Design
purpose: Design and populate a canonical invariant registry defining machine-verifiable global invariants for the governance runtime.
architectural_constraints: Invariants must be declarative, not procedural
Every invariant must have severity, validation method, and auto-remediation recommendation
Registry must validate against a schema
acceptance_criteria: 7 invariant categories defined: execution, replay, lock, event, transition, healing, audit
Each invariant has id, description, validation_method, severity, remediation
Invariants are cross-referenced to protocols they protect

traceability.description: Created canonical invariant registry with 10 invariants across 7 categories (execution:2, replay:1, lock:1, event:1, transition:1, healing:1, audit:3). All invariants validate against invariant.schema.json. 4 CRITICAL, 5 HIGH severity. Cross-referenced to 10 protocols.
